title: Patchouli's Library
description: Quickly access all Patchouli books and other guides via buttons in your inventory
body:
This mod adds a screen that lists all Patchouli books and other guide‑books and lets you open them.
You can pin up to 6 books, which are then shown in the inventory screen for quick access.
The screen is accessible via a button on the inventory screen.

Useful when you have a lot of books in your modpack.

Supported mods:
- All mods that use [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)

![inventory screen with mod buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8E0L1gA7/images/4129b2240954924a4e3f6e8bf253a42eb90325df.png)
![the mod screen with 10 book list in it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8E0L1gA7/images/2ac74df267ba778148f72a480cabbdf74d9b0930.png)
